It's an unforgettable night in Paris as the 33rd Summer Olympic Games finally opened in the French capital on Friday. Unlike the previous versions, the opening ceremony this time wasn't limited to a stadium. Paris moved it outside to the heart of the city and transformed the urban spaces into a big stage.

Participating delegations paraded down the River Seine on boat, alongside some iconic architectural masterpieces. The opening ceremony performances and the way that the Olympic cauldron was lit all showed the romance and fantasy of the French people.

What's the most memorable moment for you? Share with us!

Smoke representing the colors of the French national flag is shown during the opening ceremony of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games in Paris, France, July 26, 2024. /CFP

Members of the Chinese delegation at the opening ceremony of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games in Paris, France, July 26, 2024. /CFP

Former French football player Zinedine Zidane hands the Olympic torch to Spanish tennis player Rafael Nadal during the opening ceremony of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games in Paris, France, July 26, 2024. /CFP

French athletes Teddy Riner and Marie-Jose Perec lit the Olympic cauldron during the opening ceremony of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games in Paris, France, July 26, 2024. /CFP

A light show illuminated the Eiffel Tower during the opening ceremony of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games in Paris, France, July 26, 2024. /CFP

Night view of the Eiffel Tower during the opening ceremony of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games in Paris, France, July 26, 2024. /CFP

Floriane Issert, a Gendarmerie non-commissioned officer of the National Gendarmerie, carries the Olympic flag into the Trocadero during the opening ceremony of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games in Paris, France, July 26, 2024. /CFP
